name: Chondroitin
summary: Decision-ready summary: Chondroitin is best framed for knee osteoarthritis comfort; cartilage-support context; safety screen: warfarin; bleeding disorder; planned surgery.
description: Chondroitin is used for joint support; proposed actions include cartilage matrix support and modulation of inflammatory enzymes in osteoarthritis physiology.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.

claimMap.claim: v9.7: Chondroitin evidence is mixed and product quality varies; conservative OA symptom support only.
claimMap.notes: v9.7: Chondroitin evidence is mixed and product quality varies; conservative OA symptom support only.

qualifiers.dose_or_duration: 800–1200 mg/day chondroitin sulfate in osteoarthritis trials
